name: DONALDSON Co INC
business: Donaldson Company, Inc. is a global leader in technology-led filtration products and solutions, serving a broad range of industries and advanced markets. The Company sells to original equipment manufacturers in construction, mining, agriculture, transportation, and to independent distributors and OEM dealer networks, as well as to industrial customers and end users in life sciences and defense.

exposures.sentence: Disk drive filters work in the background to help protect critical components in cloud computing: streaming, storage, sharing and business-to-business interaction.
Microelectronics delivers product filtration solutions for gas phase molecular contamination at fabrication, tool and point-of-use locations.

Donaldson s bioprocessing business provides equipment and consumables to support the development and production of biologic drugs and genetic medicines, including mAbs, mRNA and cell and gene therapies, along with many other applications that use a bioprocessing workflow.

Key products include battery, powertrain and headlight vents for the automotive industry, including for electric vehicles, as well as venting solutions for hearing aids, ostomy bags and implantable devices.

Aerospace and Defense products consist of air, fuel, lubrication and hydraulic filtration for fixed-wing and rotorcraft aerospace applications and ground defense vehicle and naval platforms.

catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2026, the Company expects its cash paid for capital expenditures to be between $65 million and $85 million, primarily associated with capacity expansion, new products and technologies and maintaining the Company s existing assets.
The estimated range of future costs associated with actions related to this restructuring through fiscal 2026 is $5.0 million to $10.0 million.
